cleavage agent: Extracted proteins were digested with trypsin
collision energy: using high-energy collision dissociation (32% normalized collision energy)
fragmentation method: Tandem mass spectra were collected using high-energy collision dissociation
instrument: an orbitrap mass spectrometer (Q-Exactive Plus; Thermo Fisher Scientific)
ionization type: Eluting peptides were directly analyzed by electrospray in an orbitrap mass spectrometer
labeling: using the intensity-based absolute quantification (iBAQ) method
